text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I'm watching a race...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh, would you look at that...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Agh! The track's all muddy! It's probably because
it rained super hard yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
No way! They said it was going to be in perfect
condition today!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, this sucks! Now my whole running strategy is
ruined!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Heh, this is perfect! Everything's just how I
expected!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hehe... haha! AHAHAHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Air Shakur is laughing like crazy. Has she
finally snapped?

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
She looks wild as ever... I hope she doesn't get
herself kicked out.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... H-hi, Shakur. Good luck today...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Oh, Doto. You came to watch! Hehehe.
Great weather today, huh?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uh... Well, it seems pretty dreary out...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Exactly! Not too hot, and no sun in my eyes!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: These are the perfect conditions for me! Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You're, um... in a really good mood today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Heheheh. Well, why wouldn't I be? Everything has
fallen perfectly into place!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No doubt—today's my day. I'm gonna win by a
landslide.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And I'm gonna start my spurt from the very back,
so they all can see me tear past 'em at the last
corner. Hilarious, right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but the track is really bad today... And it might
rain soon...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All of that is within the margin of error. There's
only one risk left to worry about...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-what's that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The risk that I'll get lost in the thrill and go
completely wild out there!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
My adrenaline is pumping! Ah, I'm gonna cut
loose today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Look at all those idiots. Heh. They don't even
consider me a threat!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Thunder?! Sh-Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't be afraid, Doto. All you need to do is keep
your eyes on me!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... HAHAHA! I'm gonna show them all!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: NOTHING beats my logic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Air Shakur crushes the
competition and takes first place, sending the
crowd into a frenzy.
